text: This study aims to reveal the thoughts of KH. M.A. Sahal Mahfudh related to Islamic education and to what extent those thoughts are applicable in the context of education in Indonesia today. This study uses qualitative research with a library research method to research the thoughts of Kiai Sahal based on his works and other relevant literature. The results show that the thought of Kiai Sahal can be developed into an integrative, transformational and contextual model of Islamic education named “The Integrative Transformational Contextual Model of Islamic Education for Today “ ITEIT” by adopting the concept of integration between religious and general sciences, developing human life through the implementation of Basic Values Sholih Akrom (NDSA) and providing contextual Madrasah Teacher Education (MTE) curriculum that is adapted to the times. Based on the applicability analysis of Kiai Sahal's thought, it can be concluded that his thought has very important meaning for reformists in developing an Islamic education that is integrative, transformational and contextual, thereby facilitating the improvement of the current Islamic Education Curriculum and the implementation of character building. This idea can still be implemented today because it has been included in the policies and implementation of Islamic education in Indonesia today. Yet, this implementation is still obstructed by the obstacles and hindrances, such as resistive, bureaucratic and low number of resources. For that, this study is expected to contribute to the Islamic Education discourse in Indonesia, especially in meeting the needs of the era, while at the same time retaining and inheriting Islamic traditions.
